docs.title: Authenticate with the API
docs.preview: How-to · Auth How-to Authenticate with the API Send the API key in the X-API-Key request header on every protected endpoint under /api/v1 . The key is a long-lived shared secret — no token-exchange flow, no per-request signature. The recipe

docs.title: Handle idempotency
docs.preview: How-to · Resilience How-to Handle idempotency Network failures and timeouts make it unsafe to retry a write blindly. The Study API uses an Idempotency-Key contract so a retried POST returns the original outcome instead of duplicating work.
